name: Tomboy Adventure
short_description: Start a relaxing adventure together with your childhood friend!
detailed_description:
Ever wanted to escape into a virtual world? Now is your chance!

Finding yourself on a secluded island, a wonderful summer awaits you.

Beside you is your girl-friend, Natsumi! You have known her for a long time but your relationship never moved past "friends".

This might be your last summer together. If you want to make your feelings known, now is your chance!

Features

Tomboy Adventure is an interaction driven dating sim where through your choices you unsuccessfully try to romance your companion. Exploring the island unlocks new dialogue options and interactions, creating new opportunities for getting your feelings across.

  • Branching dialogue

  • Headpatting

  • Explorable island

  • Fishing

  • Day/night cycle

  • Dynamic weather

  • Camping

  • Advanced headpatting

  • Both VR and non-VR play is supported!

The summer is short so lets enjoy it!
